data.title: Add model ID lint check to validate.sh
data.description:
Add check to validate.sh that greps for claude-(haiku|sonnet|opus)-[0-9] patterns across plugins/dso/ and evals/ (*.yaml, *.sh, *.py, *.md), EXCLUDING:
- .claude/dso-config.conf (canonical source)
- .test-index (RED markers)
- tests/ directory (fixture files)
- plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md (documents patterns as examples)
Reports matches and exits non-zero if found. Remove RED marker.

TDD: Task 8 RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Current codebase passes lint (no stale IDs outside config)
  Verify: ! grep -rn 'claude-\(haiku\|sonnet\|opus\)-[0-9]' plugins/dso/ evals/ --include='*.yaml' --include='*.sh' --include='*.py' --include='*.md' | grep -v 'dso-config.conf' | grep -v '.test-index' | grep -v '^tests/' | grep -v 'SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md' | grep -q .
